overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding depicting a delivery porter traversing a desolate rocky landscape under overcast skies with falling timefall particles. The character navigates through narrow canyons, passes a small illuminated structure, wades through a body of water, and continues along a rocky shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with high stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky canyon with high walls on both sides, navigating the uneven gravel path

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall dark rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
uneven rocky ground surface forming the canyon floor
hazy mountain silhouettes visible at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed rocky canyon with steep stone walls on both sides. The path is uneven gravel, and the sky is partially visible overhead through the canyon opening ahead. Timefall particles drift down through the diffused light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky wasteland with distant structure

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into an open rocky landscape with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking across open rocky terrain toward a small structure with blue light, with a tall tower visible in the far distance

entered.detail: small building or shelter emitting a distinct blue glow
tall thin tower structure visible on the horizon
large boulders scattered across the open ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character exits the canyon into a wide, desolate rocky landscape. A small structure with blue light appears on the left, and a tall tower stands on the distant horizon. The terrain is barren with scattered boulders and patches of dry grass.

events.description: character enters the water, transitioning from walking to wading

agents.ego_description: walking downhill toward the water's edge, passing the blue-lit structure, then wading into the shallow water

entered.detail: large dark body of water ahead, reflecting the grey sky
rocky edge where the land meets the water

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the shoreline, passing the blue-lit structure on the left. The terrain slopes down toward a dark body of water. At around 45 seconds, the character steps into the water and begins wading forward as the depth increases.

agents.ego_description: swimming through the dark water with arms outstretched, heading toward the opposite rocky shore

entered.detail: steep rock face visible on the right side across the water

segments.scene_description: The character is fully immersed in the water, swimming forward with a breaststroke motion. The surrounding landscape consists of rocky cliffs on both sides, and the water is dark and calm. The opposite shore becomes progressively closer.

events.description: character exits the water onto the rocky shore on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: emerging from the water and walking across the rocky beach toward the inland terrain

entered.detail: large scattered boulders and rocky terrain on the shore

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto a rocky shore composed of large boulders and gravel. A steep cliff wall rises on the right side, and the terrain continues inland as a desolate rocky path. The water remains visible behind as the character moves forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a narrow stone corridor into a vast, desolate wilderness. It begins with the character navigating an enclosed rocky canyon, where steep walls frame a path of uneven gravel under a drift of falling timefall particles. As the character advances, the oppressive stone walls recede and the scene opens up into a wide, barren landscape of scattered boulders and patches of dry grass. The perspective then expands to reveal a small structure emitting a blue light on the left, before shifting focus toward a tall tower standing on the distant horizon under a diffused sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends from a rocky slope, crosses a dark body of water, and emerges onto a desolate shoreline. It begins with the character passing a blue-lit structure on the left while moving down a slope toward the water's edge. As the terrain dips, the character steps into the dark depths and transitions into a breaststroke swim, gliding between towering rocky cliffs. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the opposite bank, climbing out of the calm water and onto a shore of large boulders and gravel. Finally, the camera follows the character inland along a desolate rocky path, with a steep cliff wall rising to the right and the water receding behind them.
